if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND g.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND g.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

choose.when: ORDER BY g.code_grp_desc ASC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY g.code_grp_desc DESC NULLS LAST

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyCodeGrp :: selectById */ g.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_code_grp g LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = g.site_id WHERE g.code_grp_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyCodeGrp :: selectList */ g.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_code_grp g LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = g.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyCodeGrp :: selectPageList */ g.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_code_grp g LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = g.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(g.*) /* base.sy :: SyCodeGrp :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_code_grp g
